overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit, candle-lit room in a survival horror video game. The player examines objects including a memo on a bench and a large wall tapestry, then explores an area with multiple beds and antique furniture.

segments.scene_description: The player begins in a dimly lit corner of a room, illuminated by a single candle on a small wooden table. A wooden bench sits nearby holding a memo. The player approaches the bench and picks up the item labeled 'Moldavite's Memo' around the 6-second mark.

agents.ego_description: moving along the wall to examine the large tapestry depicting a hunting scene

entered.detail: large wall hanging depicting a hunting scene with a stag and figures in red and gold tones
metal bed frame railing visible in the foreground
tall dark wooden cabinet with glass doors

segments.scene_description: The player moves along the wall away from the candle, revealing a large ornate tapestry depicting a hunting scene with a stag. A wooden cabinet comes into view on the right as the player continues exploring the perimeter of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: dormitory with multiple beds and antique furniture

events.description: turning from the tapestry wall to face the main room area with multiple beds

agents.ego_description: walking between the metal bed frames and examining the desk and window area

entered.detail: wooden writing desk with items on top near the window
window with white curtains showing dark night outside
white fabric room divider hanging from ceiling
white metal bed frame positioned near the window
second white metal bed frame further into the room

segments.scene_description: The player turns into the main area of the room, revealing multiple metal bed frames arranged along the walls, a wooden desk near a curtained window, and a white fabric room divider. The player continues to explore the space, walking between the beds and examining the antique furniture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a secluded, candle-lit corner into the wider, cluttered expanse of a dimly lit room. It begins beside a small wooden table where a single candle casts a glow over a wooden bench, with the camera pausing to pick up a note labeled Moldavite's Memo. As the camera moves away from the light and along the wall, the view shifts to reveal a large ornate tapestry of a hunting stag and a wooden cabinet. The scene then opens into the main area of the room, where the perspective glides past multiple metal bed frames and a wooden desk positioned near a curtained window. Finally, the camera weaves between the beds and a white fabric room divider to examine the remaining antique furniture.
